item.title: Mother Still Searching After 4 Years
item.description: A mother continues searching for her daughter four years after she went missing, highlighting an ongoing case and the need for public awareness.

media:content.media:title: Mother Still Searching After 4 Years
media:content.media:description: A mother continues searching for her daughter four years after she went missing, highlighting an ongoing case and the need for public awareness.

item.title: The Alien Who Lived in the Pentagon
item.description: A look at the story behind the Pentagon’s so-called alien, exploring the claims and context in a factual, respectful way.

media:content.media:title: The Alien Who Lived in the Pentagon
media:content.media:description: A look at the story behind the Pentagon’s so-called alien, exploring the claims and context in a factual, respectful way.

item.title: A Sheriff’s Case That Lasted Nearly Two Decades
item.description: A long-running case that stayed with a sheriff for nearly two decades, highlighting the persistence of the investigation and the unanswered questions.

media:content.media:title: A Sheriff’s Case That Lasted Nearly Two Decades
media:content.media:description: A long-running case that stayed with a sheriff for nearly two decades, highlighting the persistence of the investigation and the unanswered questions.

item.title: LEGO Bricks Help Solve Lucille's Case
item.description: LEGO bricks played a key role in solving Lucille's case 23 years later.

media:content.media:title: LEGO Bricks Help Solve Lucille's Case
media:content.media:description: LEGO bricks played a key role in solving Lucille's case 23 years later.
